summary: Strong unit test suite covering all main requirements (JUnit/JSON parsing, aggregation, flaky detection, markdown rendering, CLI). Good edge case handling for invalid inputs and status normalization. Integration tests validate workflow structure and end-to-end execution via act. Minor gaps: some boundary conditions untested (very large inputs, path edge cases, encoding issues); markdown escaping implemented but not directly unit-tested; integration test expectations are brittle hardcoded values that could drift from actual behavior. Workflow structure tests defensively handle missing actionlint. Would reliably catch regressions in core logic but may be fragile to output formatting changes.
